Hub Home > Human Resources > 90-Day Onboarding Program Builder

90-Day Onboarding Program Builder

Create a structured 90-day onboarding plan broken into Week 1 (orientation), Weeks 2-4 (role ramp), and Months 2-3 (independence milestones) with check-in schedules, training resources, and manager talking points.

Intermediate ADD YOUR EXAMPLES Employee-retention
Pro tip

Provide your existing onboarding docs (even messy ones) as few-shot context. Include the role-specific tools and systems the new hire needs access to. Add a "buddy system" pairing recommendation.

onboarding new hire training retention employee experience

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are an HR and employee experience specialist. Design a comprehensive 90-day onboarding program for a new [JOB_TITLE] at [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE]...
You are an HR and employee experience specialist. Design a comprehensive 90-day onboarding program for a new [JOB_TITLE] at [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE]...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are an HR and employee experience specialist. Design a comprehensive 90-day onboarding program for a new [JOB_TITLE] at [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees).

<existing_resources>
Current onboarding docs: [PASTE OR DESCRIBE WHAT YOU HAVE]
Tools/systems they need access to: [LIST]
Key stakeholders they will work with: [LIST ROLES]
</existing_resources>

<examples_of_good_onboarding>
At a previous company, we did this well: [DESCRIBE 1-2 THINGS THAT WORKED]
</examples_of_good_onboarding>

Structure the program in 3 phases:

**Phase 1 — Week 1 (Orientation):**
- Day-by-day schedule
- Welcome activities and culture immersion
- System access and tool setup checklist
- Key people to meet (with suggested conversation starters)
- End-of-week check-in agenda

**Phase 2 — Weeks 2-4 (Role Ramp-Up):**
- Weekly learning objectives
- Hands-on tasks with increasing ownership
- Buddy/mentor pairing recommendation
- Bi-weekly check-in agenda and questions
- Quick wins to build confidence

**Phase 3 — Months 2-3 (Building Independence):**
- Monthly milestones and deliverables
- Stretch assignments
- Cross-functional exposure opportunities
- 30/60/90 day review templates (what to evaluate, questions to ask)
- Manager talking points for each review

Include a "new hire feedback survey" for day 7, day 30, and day 90.
Notes: Few-shot examples of past good onboarding dramatically improve output quality. Store the program in a Claude Project.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as an HR expert specializing in employee onboarding. Build a 90-day onboarding plan for a new [JOB_TITLE] at [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**What we have...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as an HR expert specializing in employee onboarding. Build a 90-day onboarding plan for a new [JOB_TITLE] at [COMPANY_NAME] ([INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**What we have today:** [DESCRIBE CURRENT ONBOARDING — even if minimal]
**Tools they need:** [LIST]
**Key people they work with:** [LIST ROLES]
**What has worked before:** [1-2 EXAMPLES]

**Week 1 — Orientation:**
- Day-by-day schedule
- Culture activities
- System/tool setup checklist
- Key meetings with conversation starters
- Week 1 check-in agenda

**Weeks 2-4 — Ramp-Up:**
- Weekly learning goals
- Hands-on tasks (increasing responsibility)
- Buddy system setup
- Bi-weekly check-in questions
- Quick win assignments

**Months 2-3 — Independence:**
- Monthly milestones
- Stretch projects
- Cross-team exposure
- 30/60/90 day review templates
- Manager talking points for each review

Also create feedback surveys for day 7, day 30, and day 90.
Notes: Build a Custom GPT called "Onboarding Builder" with your company culture doc and tool stack pre-loaded.

**What we currently have:** [DESCRIBE]
**Tools they...
I need a 90-day onboarding plan for a new [JOB_TITLE] joining my [INDUSTRY] company ([TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**What we currently have:** [DESCRIBE]
**Tools they...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

I need a 90-day onboarding plan for a new [JOB_TITLE] joining my [INDUSTRY] company ([TEAM_SIZE] employees).

**What we currently have:** [DESCRIBE]
**Tools they will need:** [LIST]
**Key people they will work with:** [LIST ROLES]
**What worked well in past onboarding:** [EXAMPLES]

**Build a 3-phase plan:**

**Week 1 (Orientation):** Day-by-day schedule, welcome activities, setup checklist, who to meet and what to discuss, end-of-week check-in.

**Weeks 2-4 (Learning the Role):** Weekly goals, hands-on tasks with growing responsibility, buddy pairing, check-in agendas, quick wins.

**Months 2-3 (Getting Independent):** Monthly milestones, stretch assignments, cross-team opportunities, 30/60/90 day review templates with manager talking points.

Include new hire feedback surveys for day 7, 30, and 90.
Notes: Gemini integrates with Google Calendar for scheduling onboarding milestones directly.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
I am hiring a [JOB_TITLE] and need a 90-day onboarding plan to get them up to speed quickly.

**About my company:** [INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees
**Our current onboarding:** [DESCRIBE — even if...
I am hiring a [JOB_TITLE] and need a 90-day onboarding plan to get them up to speed quickly.

**About my company:** [INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees
**Our current onboarding:** [DESCRIBE — even if...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

I am hiring a [JOB_TITLE] and need a 90-day onboarding plan to get them up to speed quickly.

**About my company:** [INDUSTRY], [TEAM_SIZE] employees
**Our current onboarding:** [DESCRIBE — even if it is just "we wing it"]
**Tools they will use:** [LIST]
**People they will work with:** [LIST]
**What has worked before:** [DESCRIBE]

**Please create:**

**Week 1 (First impressions):**
- A day-by-day schedule
- Welcome and culture activities
- A checklist of tools and access to set up
- Who they should meet and what to talk about
- A check-in agenda for end of week 1

**Weeks 2-4 (Learning the job):**
- What they should learn each week
- Real tasks to work on (start easy, get harder)
- A buddy to pair them with
- Check-in questions for every 2 weeks
- Easy wins to build their confidence

**Months 2-3 (Working independently):**
- Monthly goals
- Challenging projects to stretch them
- Chances to work with other teams
- Templates for 30, 60, and 90-day reviews
- What the manager should discuss at each review

Also write a short feedback survey for day 7, day 30, and day 90.
Notes: Copilot in Microsoft Teams can set up the onboarding check-in meetings automatically.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the 90-Day Onboarding Program Builder prompt do?

Create a structured 90-day onboarding plan broken into Week 1 (orientation), Weeks 2-4 (role ramp), and Months 2-3 (independence milestones) with check-in schedules, training resources, and manager talking points.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
